title: Forge resource pack metadata warning fix
reported_warning: Mod file failed to load correct resource pack info
fix: Extended github_static_audit.py to fail fast when pack.mcmeta is missing, invalid, or has the wrong pack_format
parity_note: This is a Forge/Minecraft 1.19.2 packaging adapter only; it does not change TC4 mechanics, recipes, GUI, research, textures, progression, or behavior.
